ddls:
CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each bus route */,
  "route_name" TEXT /* Name of the bus route */,
  "route_description" TEXT /* Description of the bus route */,
  "route_type" TEXT /* Type of route (e.g., suburban, city, express) */,
  "route_color" TEXT /* Color code for the route for visual identification */,
  "route_directions" TEXT /* Directions or key stops on the route */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the bus route */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the bus route */,
  "headway_peak" INTEGER /* Headway in seconds during peak hours */,
  "headway_off_peak" INTEGER /* Headway in seconds during off-peak hours */,
  "exact_times_required" INTEGER /* Indicates whether exact times are required for the route */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule */,
  "route_id" TEXT /* Reference to the bus route */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week for the schedule */,
  "schedule_description" TEXT /* Description of the schedule */,
  "schedule_type" TEXT /* Type of schedule (e.g., peak, off-peak, special event) */,
  "schedule_notes" TEXT /* Notes or additional information about the schedule */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time for the schedule */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time for the schedule */,
  "headway_secs" INTEGER /* Headway in seconds */,
  "exact_times" INTEGER /* Indicates whether exact times are required for the schedule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buses" (
  "bus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bus */,
  "route_id" TEXT /* Reference to the bus route */,
  "bus_number" TEXT /* Bus number */,
  "bus_model" TEXT /* Model of the bus */,
  "bus_manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the bus */,
  "bus_year" INTEGER /* Year the bus was manufactured */,
  "bus_fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used by the bus (e.g., diesel, electric) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the bus */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the bus (e.g., in-service, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_buses_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "driver_name" TEXT /* Name of the driver */,
  "driver_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the driver */,
  "driver_email" TEXT /* Email address of the driver */,
  "driver_hire_date" TEXT /* Date the driver was hired */,
  "driver_license_number" TEXT /* Driver's license number */,
  "driver_license_expiry" TEXT /* Expiry date of the driver's license */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the driver (e.g., active, on-leave) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "route_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "route_id" TEXT /* Reference to the bus route */,
  "bus_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bus */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the driver */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date of the assignment */,
  "assignment_notes" TEXT /* Notes or additional information about the assignment */,
  "assignment_status" TEXT /* Status of the assignment (e.g., confirmed, pending, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_assignments_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_assignments_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_assignments_bus_id FOREIGN KEY ("bus_id") REFERENCES buses ("bus_id")
)
